business_ideas.idea: Develop e-commerce brand using UGC creators and TikTok Shop affiliate model
Create agency managing TikTok creators who generate product content for affiliate commissions
Coach non-famous creators on authentic product videos for TikTok Shop monetization
Build podcast about social selling and creator commerce strategies
Replicate Milk Road newsletter model with different vertical like crypto or finance

predictions.text: UGC creator model will become the dominant customer acquisition channel for e-commerce
TikTok Shop will grow into multi-hundred billion dollar commerce platform for creators
The future of investing is behavioral modification rather than financial strategy optimization
